minimum_payload_or_ref: run_name; direction_id; site; batch_id; entrypoint_ref; input_refs
boundary_note: Execution context only, not publish truth

minimum_payload_or_ref: status; reason_code; primary_output_refs; row_counts when available
boundary_note: Output summary is not final business verdict

current_b_carrier_or_precursor: row counts; artifact counts; retry counts; latency facts from current summaries
boundary_note: KPI delta is local runtime movement only

minimum_payload_or_ref: batch_id; dispatch_mode; execution_class; status; reason_code; object_refs
boundary_note: Only a full run root may claim this object

minimum_payload_or_ref: typed evidence refs for workbook screenshot trace auth incident and step receipts
boundary_note: Raw auth content stays out of payload

minimum_payload_or_ref: entrypoint; started_at/finished_at when available; status; reason_code; error_type
boundary_note: Current B often has precursors rather than one first-class shared file

current_b_carrier_or_precursor: verify linkage placeholder; deterministic-check precursor; review packet note
boundary_note: Missing hard-gate proof must keep verify at HOLD or NOT_RUN

current_b_carrier_or_precursor: rollback note; replay/profile recovery evidence; git checkpoint ref
boundary_note: Local execution rollback only, not publish rollback

minimum_payload_or_ref: input_summary; output_summary; kpi_delta; verify_status; rollback_triggered; error_type; operator_score_placeholder
provider; model; invocation_ref; output_ref; latency_or_usage; verify_linkage
boundary_note: Emit only when a real model call happened

minimum_payload_or_ref: dispatch_mode=shadow; execution_class; status; reason_code; comparison_anchor_ref optional
boundary_note: Shadow result only, never final business closure
Workbook success does not equal final verdict
Auth incident is observation/evidence, not business closure
